notes: Filed the motion this morning; status hearing is on the 8th. Marcus is covering Tuesday's intake.
Speed work felt sharper this week — 8x400 at goal pace, last one fastest. Knee held up.
Naomi dinner Wednesday confirmed — Avec, my pick. Friday is Big Star.
Long run Saturday — 12 miles at HM pace. Derek setting the front pack.
Dad called twice on Sunday, talked about Mom's church potluck and the Colts. Good week.
Lorraine wants the brief by EOD Friday. Doable; I'll block tomorrow afternoon for revisions.
Trial #1 starts Oct 5 — calendar locked, weekend prior is prep block, gym is off the schedule.
Iron supplement run is steady; next bloodwork is at Wicker Park Health in August.
